overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character walking through a snowy, foggy forest with tall grass and snow-covered pine trees, then ascending a rocky slope to a ridge. The atmosphere is cold and misty with low visibility from falling snow and fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy forest floor with tall grass between pine trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass in a snowy forest, heading toward rocky terrain in the distance

entered.detail: tall green grass covering the forest floor, swaying slightly in the wind
snow-covered evergreen pine trees with heavy snow on branches
snow-covered evergreen pine trees with heavy snow on branches
large moss-covered boulders and rocky formations emerging from the snow

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense snowy forest with tall grass underfoot. Snow-covered pine trees line both sides of the path while mossy rock outcrops are visible in the distance through the falling snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky slope ascent in snowy forest

events.description: ground surface transitions from tall grass to mossy rock slope as character begins ascending

agents.ego_description: climbing up a mossy rock slope, leaving the grassy forest floor behind

entered.detail: steep moss-covered rock face with patches of snow, forming a natural ramp upward
tall foggy cliff faces visible through the snow in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the grassy forest floor onto a mossy rock slope and begins ascending. The pine trees recede into the background as distant foggy cliffs become visible through the falling snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky ridge top overlooking foggy valley

events.description: reaches the top of the rocky ridge revealing a wide view of the foggy valley and distant cliffs

agents.ego_description: walking along the top of the rocky ridge, surveying the foggy landscape ahead

entered.detail: flat mossy rock surface at the crest of the slope with sparse snow coverage
massive cliff walls barely visible through the heavy snow and fog
deep valley below covered in snow and mist

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the rocky ridge top, revealing a sweeping view of a foggy valley with distant cliffs barely visible through the snow. The terrain opens up as the character walks along the ridge edge with snow-covered trees now visible on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, snowy forest that gradually ascends to a sweeping mountain ridge. It begins with the character walking through tall grass and snow-covered pine trees, with mossy rock outcrops appearing faintly through the falling snow. As the character moves forward, the grassy floor transitions into a mossy rock slope, and the pine trees recede into the background as distant foggy cliffs emerge. The scene then opens up as the character reaches the ridge top, revealing a wide view of a misty valley and far-off cliffs. Finally, the camera follows the character along the edge of the ridge, where the terrain expands and snow-covered trees line the right side of the path.
